series_metadata.series_description: Record of equipment includes - equipment input sheets, additions, deletions, changes, copies of property disposal, correspondence advising of location changes, corrections, items sold, copies of invoices setup in accounts payable on June 30th and December 31st, tabulation of vehicles owned by Ohio Turnpike Commission, record of tags used, reconciliation of fixed assets (running totals), statement of contents, schedule of data processing equipment, Ohio Turnpike Commission inventory summary, audit work papers - additions, deletions and changes and inventory master maintenance. Includes: 1) Fixed Assets Type 1 - Office, Type 5 - Radio and Type 6 - Telephone Equipment By Location -Equipment 060. 2) Fixed Assets - Equipment Insurance Coverage Computer generated report showing insurance coverage on major equipment. 3) Data Processing Equipment - EQP 090.
